resources.string: Koda loves to run around the dog park. Koda\'s favorite toy is a squeaky bone.
Lola loves going on walks with her owners. Lola loves her little sweater in the fall.
Frankie loves to run. Frankie loves her ball.
Nox is a puppy. Nox loves to play tug of war.
Faye loves frisbee. Faye\'s favorite is a bright orange frisbee.
Bella loves playing fetch. Bella likes her purple frisbee best.
Moana loves swimming. Moana loves diving into the pool.
Tzeitel loves napping on the couch. Tzeitel\'s favorite blanket is a soft blue one.
Leroy loves hiking. Leroy always wears his hiking boots.
